features.name: wide ternary conditional with class method calls
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional operator with wide bit vector result type (>= 64 bits) where both branches call class methods

features.name: ternary conditional with null check on class handle
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional where the condition is a null check on a class handle

features.name: wide ternary causing VL_COND_W function call
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional with wide result type that triggers VL_COND_W* function generation
